title: minuartia arctica
intro: Minuartia arctica, also known as Arctic sandwort, is a low-growing, perennial plant species belonging to the carnation family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Minuartia arctica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
